_publications._publicationTitle: Multiomic analyses reveal new targets of polycomb repressor complex 2 in Schwann lineage cells and malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

_contextSnippet: Transient knockdown of SUZ12 (siRNA treatment every 2 days for 1 week) in iPNF significantly decreased SUZ12 protein and increased cleaved NOTCH1 and NOTCH3
details: Transient knockdown of SUZ12 significantly decreased SUZ12 protein and increased cleaved NOTCH1 and NOTCH3
